meta.title: Knee — Diagnosis and Treatment | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
meta.description: Meniscus tears, ligament injuries and cartilage wear — knee diagnosis and treatment by Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, shoulder & knee surgeon with 37 years of experience. Maccabi clinics.

injuries.metaTitle: Knee Injuries — Meniscus, Ligaments & Cartilage | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
injuries.metaDescription: Meniscus tears, cruciate ligament injuries and cartilage damage — how to recognize each knee injury, what the right treatment is and when to see a knee specialist.

injectionsVsSurgery.metaTitle: Knee Injections as an Alternative to Surgery | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
injectionsVsSurgery.metaDescription: When a knee injection can replace surgery and when surgery is the right solution — a balanced comparison of the options, from a specialist with 37 years of experience.

surgery.metaTitle: Knee Surgery — Meniscus & Ligament Reconstruction | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
surgery.metaDescription: Arthroscopic knee surgery: treating meniscus tears and cruciate ligament reconstruction. When surgery is needed, how to prepare and what to expect in recovery.

rehabilitation.metaTitle: Rehabilitation After Knee Surgery | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
rehabilitation.metaDescription: Rehabilitation after knee surgery: the recovery phases, typical timelines and the safe path back to full activity and sport.

physiotherapy.metaTitle: Knee Physiotherapy — Conservative Care | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
physiotherapy.metaDescription: Knee physiotherapy: muscle strengthening, improved stability and conservative treatment of knee pain — and when the right exercise spares surgery.
